items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Andiamo Snake Skin Handbag. The snake skin finally joins the Andiamo family. As a fan of the brand, you know Andiamo is a deserved classic bestseller. It fits any season and perfectly meets the style of women who don't want to be too flashy or burdensome. Combining its own elegance, the snake skin doesn't feel too ostentatious, revealing a wild side with full exotic charm.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Small Hop Python 🐍 In Stock 📣📣📣. The snake skin series hasn't seen new arrivals in a while, and this release proves Hop's growing popularity. Hop is deeply loved for its ample capacity and simple, generous design, often being hard to get. The python skin features clear patterns and full color. Hop's minimalism fully displays the wild beauty of the python. Only those who truly appreciate this style can carry it off.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA women's woven makeup bag is here! Long-time BV fans will surely recognize this little bag. This time, the double zipper has been changed to a single zipper for a cleaner and simpler use. Small size, big capacity, it can even fit a foundation!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta—Color-Block Series BV Loop Camera Bag 💥, the best value for money. Large woven texture + consistently high-quality calfskin. Features a zipper and adjustable drawstring. The 'small belly' is surprisingly spacious 💫, holds everything, and is very lightweight. Suitable for girls of all ages.

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta's 2024 Fall/Winter highlight, shining from the runway to the streets. It brings a rich retro vibe and easily creates different styles through versatile combinations. items.name_en: Bottega Veneta's new bowling bag: What can it hold? Have you got yours yet? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ The sense of fashion is not reduced at all. Combines BV's classic weaving elements, and a laptop can fit inside. The shoulder strap length is adjustable, suitable for tall girls, and looks sunny on guys ☀️

items.name_en: BottegaVeneta This evening bag (crocodile) is truly cool and beautiful
items.name_cn:
BottegaVeneta This evening bag (crocodile) is truly cool and beautiful
Each color has a different vibe
Andiamo is Bottega's most talked-about model recently
If you are tired of big logo prints, come appreciate the high-end feel of the woven craftsmanship
​Simple structure with rounded lines
A tubular woven design combined with jewelry craftsmanship, featuring a brass muse metal knot buckle that brings together all the classics
​Model: 741511
​Size: 31*13*3

items.name_en: BottegaVeneta This evening bag is truly cool and beautiful.
items.name_cn:
BottegaVeneta This evening bag is truly cool and beautiful.
Each color has a unique vibe.
Andiamo is Bottega's most talked-about model recently.
If you are tired of the big logo, come appreciate the high-end feel of the woven craftsmanship.
Crafted from Nappa calfskin with fine silk weaving, the leather is incredibly delicate and soft.
Simple structure with rounded lines.
A tubular woven design combined with jewelry craftsmanship features a brass Muse metal rope knot buckle, bringing together all the classics.
Model: 741511
Size: 31*13*3
